name: Nasus

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Soul Eater
passive.description_source: Innate:  Nasus gains  life steal based on level.

effects.description: Innate: Nasus gains 12% / 18% / 24% (based on level) life steal.

passive.description: Innate: Nasus gains 12% / 18% / 24% (based on level) life steal.

basic_ability_1.name: Siphoning Strike
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active: Nasus empowers his next basic attack within 10 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 50 bonus range, and deal bonus physical damage. Siphoning Strike's base damage is affected by critical strike modifiers.

effects.context_notes: Active: Nasus empowers his next basic attack within 10 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 50 bonus range, and deal bonus physical damage.

effects.description: If Siphoning Strike kills the target, Nasus permanently gains 3 stacks, increased to 12 if the target is a champion, large minion, or large monster.
Siphoning Strike resets Nasus' basic attack timer.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Nasus empowers his next basic attack within 10 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 50 bonus range, and deal bonus physical damage. Siphoning Strike's base damage is affected by critical strike modifiers.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Siphoning Strike is a next-basic-attack empower with attack-cadence-coupled hit timing (not instant on cast), including an uncancellable windup and auto-attack-timer reset behavior.

Source notes (summary): Both base and stack bonus damage are treated as basic damage while also being tagged to trigger spell-effect hooks; stack gain applies on valid kill targets and excludes secondary-effect cleanups (for example Tiamat splash).

basic_ability_2.name: Wither
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Nasus ages the target enemy champion for a few seconds, gradually  slowing and  crippling them over the duration.

effects.context_notes: Active: Nasus ages the target enemy champion for 5 seconds, slowing them by 35% and crippling them by 26.25%, with both values ramping upward each second over the duration.
Active: Nasus ages the target enemy champion for 5 seconds, slowing them by 35% and crippling them by 26.25%, with both values ramping upward each second over the duration.
Active: Nasus ages the target enemy champion for 5 seconds, slowing them by 35% and crippling them by 26.25%, with both values ramping upward each second over the duration.
Active: Nasus ages the target enemy champion for 5 seconds, slowing them by 35% and crippling them by 26.25%, with both values ramping upward each second over the duration.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Nasus ages the target enemy champion for 5 seconds, slowing them by 35% and crippling them by 26.25%, both increasing every second over the duration.
context_notes: Manual behavior verification (2026-02-24): Wither is a target-locked debuff with player-visible gradual ramp, so slow and cripple values update over duration rather than resolving as a single static snapshot at cast time.
Source notes (summary): Wither interrupts the target's attack windup when it is first applied.

basic_ability_3.name: Spirit Fire
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Nasus unleashes a spirit fire at the target location that deals magic damage to enemies within.

effects.context_notes: Active: Nasus unleashes a spirit fire at the target location, granting sight of the area for 2.5 seconds and, after a 0.264 seconds delay, dealing magic damage to enemies within.
The fire then remains for 5 seconds, dealing magic damage each second to enemies within and inflicting them with armor reduction, lingering for 1 second.
The fire then remains for 5 seconds, dealing magic damage each second to enemies within and inflicting them with armor reduction, lingering for 1 second.
The fire then remains for 5 seconds, dealing magic damage each second to enemies within and inflicting them with armor reduction, lingering for 1 second.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Nasus unleashes a spirit fire at the target location, granting sight of the area for 2.5 seconds and, after a 0.264 seconds delay, dealing magic damage to enemies within.
context_notes: Manual behavior verification (2026-02-24): Spirit Fire has cast windup then delayed first impact (~0.264 seconds); damage and armor-reduction effects resolve on zone interaction, not on cast input.
Manual behavior verification (2026-02-24): After the initial impact, Spirit Fire ticks every 1 second for 5 seconds and armor reduction lingers for 1 second after leaving the zone.

ultimate.name: Fury of the Sands
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Nasus empowers himself for some time, gaining bonus size,  health,  armor,  magic resist, and  attack range.

effects.context_notes: Active: Nasus empowers himself for 15 seconds, gaining bonus health, bonus armor, bonus magic resistance, increased size, and 50 bonus attack range for the duration.
Active: Nasus empowers himself for 15 seconds, gaining bonus health, bonus armor, bonus magic resistance, increased size, and 50 bonus attack range for the duration.
Active: Nasus empowers himself for 15 seconds, gaining bonus health, bonus armor, bonus magic resistance, increased size, and 50 bonus attack range for the duration.
While Nasus is empowered, he deals magic damage every 0.5 seconds to nearby enemies, capped at 240 per second, and Siphoning Strike's cooldown is halved.
While Nasus is empowered, he deals magic damage every 0.5 seconds to nearby enemies, capped at 240 per second, and Siphoning Strike's cooldown is halved.

ultimate.description: Active: Nasus empowers himself for 15 seconds, gaining bonus health, bonus armor, bonus magic resistance, increased size, and 50 bonus attack range for the duration.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Fury of the Sands' bonus health is not affected by Grievous Wounds and Nasus retains it once the duration ends.

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
context_notes: Manual behavior re-verification (2026-02-24, wave 103): Spirit Fire execution semantics were expanded with delayed-impact and per-second zone-tick timing notes.
